allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST -F "file=@/Users/shixiangren/Work/cello-practise/example/perpetual-motion-in-d-major-variation-a.mid" http://localhost:3000/api/midi/parse | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"标题: {d['title']}\\"\); print\(f\\"BPM: {int\(d['bpm']\)}\\"\); print\(f\\"拍号: {d['time_signature']}\\"\); print\(f\\"音符数: {d['note_count']}\\"\); print\(f\\"小节数: {d['measure_count']}\\"\); print\(f\\"乐器: {', '.join\([i['name'] for i in d['instruments'][:3]]\)}\\"\)")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/sheets?page=1&limit=10" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sheets=d.get\('sheets', []\); print\('Found sheets:'\); [print\(f\\"  ID: {s['id']}, Title: {s['title']}, Path: {s.get\('local_path', 'N/A'\)}\\"\) for s in sheets]")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/midi/4/notes" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Title: {d.get\('title'\)}\\"\); print\(f\\"BPM: {d.get\('bpm'\)}\\"\); print\(f\\"Notes count: {len\(d.get\('notes', []\)\)}\\"\); print\('First 3 notes:'\); [print\(f\\"  {n}\\"\) for n in d.get\('notes', []\)[:3]]")
